nodes.name: Proposal Request Webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered from intake form submission or manual CRM action

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;

// Package pricing database
const PRICING = {
  'ai-lead-nurture': { setup: 4500, monthly: 750, name: 'AI-Powered Lead Nurture Engine' },
  'ai-support-bot': { setup: 3500, monthly: 500, name: 'AI Customer Support Bot' },
  'ai-booking': { setup: 2500, monthly: 400, name: 'Appointment Booking & Follow-Up' },
  'ai-content-pipeline': { setup: 3000, monthly: 1200, name: 'AI Content Pipeline' },
  'ai-ops-suite': { setup: 5500, monthly: 800, name: 'Business Operations Suite' },
  'ai-phone': { setup: 4000, monthly: 600, name: 'AI Phone System' },
  'ai-audit': { setup: 7500, monthly: 0, name: 'AI Workflow Audit' },
  'web-gov-saas': { setup: 20000, monthly: 1500, name: 'Gov & Compliance SaaS Platform' },
  'web-pro-site': { setup: 3000, monthly: 0, name: 'Professional Services Website' },
  'web-authority': { setup: 3500, monthly: 800, name: 'Authority Niche Site' },
  'web-portal': { setup: 10000, monthly: 800, name: 'Client Portal & Dashboard' },
  'web-landing': { setup: 2000, monthly: 0, name: 'Landing Page Conversion System' },
  'web-saas-mvp': { setup: 14000, monthly: 1000, name: 'Full-Stack SaaS MVP' },
  'dir-turnkey': { setup: 5000, monthly: 500, name: 'Turnkey Niche Directory' },
  'dir-suite': { setup: 8500, monthly: 1000, name: 'Directory + SuiteDash Bundle' },
  'dir-portfolio': { setup: 12000, monthly: 1500, name: 'Directory Portfolio (3-Pack)' },
  'ugc-youtube': { setup: 3000, monthly: 1500, name: 'Faceless YouTube Channel' },
  'ugc-brand': { setup: 2000, monthly: 2000, name: 'UGC Brand Content Package' },
  'ugc-repurpose': { setup: 800, monthly: 2500, name: 'Content Repurposing Engine' },
  'host-wp': { setup: 0, monthly: 149, name: 'Managed WordPress Hosting' },
  'host-app': { setup: 0, monthly: 149, name: 'App Hosting (Vercel + 20i)' },
  'biz-llc': { setup: 2500, monthly: 0, name: 'LLC Formation & Business-in-a-Box' },
  'biz-entity': { setup: 7500, monthly: 0, name: 'Multi-Entity Structuring' },
  'biz-tax': { setup: 0, monthly: 250, name: 'Tax Strategy & Compliance' },
  'biz-notary': { setup: 200, monthly: 0, name: 'Notary & Document Services' },
  'ux-sprint': { setup: 10000, monthly: 0, name: 'UX Research Sprint (2-Week)' },
  'ux-ai-assessment': { setup: 12500, monthly: 0, name: 'AI/UX Readiness Assessment' },
  'ux-fractional': { setup: 0, monthly: 6500, name: 'Fractional Head of Research' },
  'ux-academic': { setup: 20000, monthly: 0, name: 'Academic-Industry Research Bridge' },
  're-creative': { setup: 2000, monthly: 500, name: 'Creative Finance Deal Structuring' },
  're-tech': { setup: 4000, monthly: 600, name: 'RE Investor Tech Stack' }
};

const packages = (data.package_ids || []).map(id => PRICING[id]).filter(Boolean);
const totalSetup = packages.reduce((s, p) => s + p.setup, 0);
const totalMonthly = packages.reduce((s, p) => s + p.monthly, 0);
const bundleDiscount = packages.length >= 3 ? 0.15 : 0;
const discountedSetup = Math.round(totalSetup * (1 - bundleDiscount));

return [{
  json: {
    client_name: data.client_name,
    client_email: data.client_email,
    client_company: data.client_company,
    packages,
    package_count: packages.length,
    total_setup: totalSetup,
    total_monthly: totalMonthly,
    bundle_discount: bundleDiscount,
    discounted_setup: discountedSetup,
    proposal_number: `DE-2026-${Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}`,
    valid_until: new Date(Date.now() + 14*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0],
    created_at: new Date().toISOString()
  }
}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template_id: 'dynasty_proposal_template', data: { client_name: $json.client_name, client_company: $json.client_company, packages: $json.packages.map(p => p.name).join(', '), total_setup: '$' + $json.discounted_setup.toLocaleString(), total_monthly: '$' + $json.total_monthly.toLocaleString() + '/mo', proposal_number: $json.proposal_number, valid_until: $json.valid_until, bundle_discount: $json.bundle_discount > 0 ? '15% bundle discount applied' : '' } }) }}

nodes.name: Generate Proposal PDF
nodes.notes: Uses Documentero to generate branded PDF proposal

parameters.subject: Your Dynasty Empire Proposal — {{ $json.proposal_number }}
parameters.html:
Your Proposal is Ready

Hi {{ $json.client_name }},

Your proposal for {{ $json.package_count }} package(s) is attached.

Total Investment: {{ $json.discounted_setup > 0 ? '$' + $json.discounted_setup.toLocaleString() + ' setup' : '' }} {{ $json.total_monthly > 0 ? '+ $' + $json.total_monthly.toLocaleString() + '/mo' : '' }}

{{ $json.bundle_discount > 0 ? '

✓ 15% bundle discount applied!

' : '' }}

This proposal is valid until {{ $json.valid_until }}.

Ready to proceed? Reply to this email or book a call.
